result.summary: Found 2 visual issues: the page content is clipped on the right side in multiple sections, and some navigation text is cut off. These make the layout feel broken on this viewport.

issues.description: The top category row is overflowing the viewport, with the rightmost tab partially cut off and the "Hot Games" label truncated.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the responsive layout so the tab row fits the screen cleanly, or make the horizontal scroll behavior explicit with proper spacing and visible affordance.

issues.description: Several game tiles in the content grids are partially off-screen on the right, causing titles/cards to be clipped and not fully readable.
issues.suggestion: Reduce the number of columns at this breakpoint, add responsive padding, or use a controlled horizontally scrollable carousel so full cards remain visible.
